name: Ranch Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients: cornmeal, flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Mix in milk and beaten eggs until well combined.
3. Stir in diced cooked ham, sharp cheddar cheese, bell pepper, and chopped pimiento.
4. Heat a well-greased 9-inch cast-iron skillet in a preheated oven at 400°F for 3 minutes or until very hot.
5. Pour the batter into the hot skillet.
6. Bake at 425°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
